mosques.name: Masjid Lindsay (Lindsay Islamic Centre)
mosques.address: 280 Kent Street West, Lindsay, ON K9V 2Z6
mosques.description: Islamic centre serving the Kawartha Lakes region including Lindsay, Bobcaygeon, and Fenelon Falls. Friday prayer at 1:30 PM year-round.
mosques.notes: Serves the broader Kawartha Lakes region. Friday prayer at 1:30 PM all year. Nearest mosque for Bobcaygeon, Fenelon Falls, and Haliburton travellers.
